essays.blurb: Dissecting 300 years of fundraising fraud to reverse-engineer a playbook for founders building real things.
Why the best defense posture borrows more from superhero mythology than Cold War doctrine.
Using science fiction as a laboratory for inventing the future — and why the best futurists are historians.
Two dramatically different worlds painted in our collective imaginations — and what they mean for what we build.
How I learned to stop worrying and love (or at least understand) the AI investment bubble.
What we call 'venture capital' is actually four different things. Continuing to pretend otherwise does a disservice to everyone involved.
